name: Kitty Litter Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mixes and bake according to directions.
2. Prepare the pudding mix and chill until ready to assemble.
3. Crumble the white sandwich cookies in small batches in a blender, scraping often. Set aside all but about 1/4 cup.
4. In the remaining 1/4 cup of cookie crumbs, add a few drops of green food coloring and mix using a fork.
5. When the cakes are cooled to room temperature, crumble them into a large bowl.
6. Add half the remaining cookie crumbs and the chilled pudding to the cake mixture. Gently combine.
7. Line a new, clean kitty litter box with plastic wrap or aluminum foil.
8. Place the mixture into the litter box.
9. Heat three Toosie rolls in a microwave-safe dish until soft and pliable. Shape the ends so they are no longer blunt by curling slightly.
10. Repeat with three more Toosie rolls and bury them in the mixture.
11. Sprinkle the remaining half of cookie crumbs over the top.
12. Scatter the green cookie crumbs lightly over the top to resemble chlorophyll in kitty litter.
13. Heat the remaining Toosie rolls, three at a time, until almost melted. Scrape them onto the cake and sprinkle with additional cookie crumbs.
14. Serve using a new pooper scooper.
